training_status: bodybuilder, cutting to single digit BF

benefits.description: Hunger on mute at 2mg, gets full fast and stays full for hours. Not hungry or irritable while cutting to single digit BF.
Feeling much better on reta during hard cut; usually miserable when hitting single digit BF but not this time.

side_effects.description: At 4mg appetite was absolutely nuked, had to drop back to 2mg because struggling to get protein in.

protocol_notes: Taking reta alongside test and tren. Started at 4mg but dropped to 2mg due to excessive appetite suppression. Main benefit is mood and reduced irritability during hard cut to single digit BF.
